steps.title: Create a Stripe account
steps.description: Sign up at stripe.com and verify your email

steps.title: Find your API keys
steps.description: Go to Developers > API Keys in the Stripe Dashboard

securityTips: Never expose your secret key in client-side code
Use environment variables for all keys
testingSteps: Make a test API call using curl with your secret key
Verify you get a successful response

commonErrors.fix: Check you're using the correct key for your environment (test vs live)

nextStepDescription: Use Integration Setup to connect Stripe to your platform.
